GLOWr 0.1.0

  • Changelog

Run the GLOW Test on a Single Genomic Region

Source: R/glow_region_test.R
glow_region_test.Rd

Tests one genomic region (a gene or a sliding window) with the GLOW variant-set procedure, optionally adding a STAAR-O test and an evidence packet. Both a gene-centric scan and a sliding-window scan call this function once per region, so the two analyses run identical per-region code.

glow_region_test(
  gds,
  region,
  filter_spec,
  null_model,
  pi_models,
  pi_features,
  reference_medians,
  b_func = NULL,
  b_model = NULL,
  ld_threshold = 0.9,
  mac_threshold = 10L,
  collapse_method = "mean",
  use_spa = NULL,
  z_scale = 1,
  staar = NULL,
  return_evidence = FALSE,
  region_summary = FALSE,
  verbose = 0
)

Arguments

gds

An open SeqVarGDSClass connection. The orchestration layer opens the GDS once per chunk and reuses it across windows, so this function does not open or close it. (A file path also works because extract_variant_set accepts one, but the intended contract is an open connection to avoid re-opening the GDS in the hot loop.)

region

A list or single-row data.frame with chr, start, end, and (optionally) label — the row shape produced by define_regions_window / define_regions_gene.

filter_spec

A glow_variant_filter from variant_filter or coding_filter.

null_model

A fitted glow_null_model from fit_null_model. Its sample_id drives sample extraction/ordering and its trait drives the score-stat dispatch.

pi_models

A loaded PI ensemble (from load_PI_models) or a model-directory path, passed to prepare_glow_input as PI_models.

pi_features

Character vector of annotation column names for PI prediction. Also the annotations extracted from the GDS, so any staar$anno_cols must be a subset of these.

reference_medians

Named numeric vector of chromosome-wide annotation medians (from compute_annotation_medians) for NA imputation in both PI prediction and STAAR annotation imputation.

b_func

Function mapping a numeric MAF vector to B values. Mutually exclusive with b_model.

b_model

A glow_B_model (from train_B_model / load_B_model). Mutually exclusive with b_func.

ld_threshold

Numeric (default 0.9). LD-pruning correlation threshold.

mac_threshold

Integer (default 10). MAC threshold for rare-variant collapsing.

collapse_method

Character (default "mean"). B/PI aggregation method for collapsed groups.

use_spa

Logical or NULL (default NULL). Selects GLOW's single-variant score statistics: NULL auto-detects (SPA for binary, standard for continuous); TRUE forces SPA (binary only — a non-binary trait errors); FALSE forces standard for any trait. GLOW-only: every GLOW family test combines the chosen Z, while STAAR (if requested) runs its own, always non-SPA, path. SPA is recommended for rare variants / unbalanced case-control; see the guidance in getZ_marg_score.

z_scale

Numeric scalar (default 1). Single-variant confounding correction (method M2) applied to every unit's Z before the GLOW combination: z_scale = 1/sqrt(inflation_factor), where inflation_factor is the single-variant genomic inflation (e.g. the LD Score regression intercept from ldsc_regression). It multiplies the score-statistic Z-scores that glow_test combines (and the evidence-packet Z_standard/Z_SPA); the correlation M_Z is invariant to a uniform Z rescaling and M_s/s0 are left untouched. z_scale = 1 is a no-op.

staar

STAAR context, or NULL (default) for GLOW only. When non-NULL, a list with null_model (a STAAR::fit_null_glm object), anno_cols (character vector of annotation column names, a subset of pi_features), and rare_maf_cutoff (numeric).

return_evidence

Logical (default FALSE). If TRUE, build and return the per-region evidence packet (post-filter variant table + per-unit B/PI/Z/weights), and request weights from glow_test.

region_summary

Logical (default FALSE). If TRUE, splice 7 region-level diagnostic columns into $result (after cMAC, before the GLOW_* p-values): n_collapsed_units (number of collapsed test units), min_MAF/max_MAF and min_MAC/max_MAC (MAF/MAC range over the post-collapse test units), and min_p_standard/min_p_SPA (smallest per-unit single-variant p-value on the standard / SPA channel; min_p_SPA is NA unless the SPA Z exists, i.e. a binary trait). These are standard per-region diagnostic columns. They are cheap (computed from input$G and the score-stat Z this function already holds) and do not require return_evidence. Default FALSE leaves the canonical row unchanged.

verbose

Integer (default 0). Verbosity threaded to the underlying calls.

Value

A list with components:

result

A single-row data.frame (the as.data.frame.glow_test_result shape: region columns, variant counts, and the GLOW p-value columns; plus the 7 region-summary columns spliced after cMAC when region_summary = TRUE), or NULL when status %in% c("skip_empty", "error").

evidence

The evidence packet, or NULL (non-NULL only when return_evidence = TRUE and status kept a row).

staar

A named list of the 8 STAAR family-omnibus p-values when a staar context was supplied (all-NA on staar_skip_single or a STAAR error), or NULL when STAAR was off.

staar_detail

The full STAAR::STAAR output, or NULL.

status

One of "ok", "skip_empty", "staar_skip_single", "error" (see Details).

message

A diagnostic message: the error message when status == "error", a STAAR error note when STAAR failed for a non-skip reason (GLOW still succeeded), else NULL.

Details

The processing pipeline, for one region, is:

  1. extract_variant_set on the open gds (skip if the region has no qualifying variants).

  2. prepare_glow_input with B-source dispatch (exactly one of b_func / b_model); LD-prune + rare-variant collapse (skip if nothing survives).

  3. compute_score_stats, honoring use_spa (default NULL = auto: SPA for binary, standard for continuous). For a binary trait the complementary single-variant Z is also computed for the evidence packet (the SPA complement only when return_evidence = TRUE).

  4. glow_test (omnibus), with weights returned when return_evidence = TRUE.

  5. If staar is non-NULL, STAAR::STAAR on the post-filter / pre-LD-prune / pre-collapse genotype matrix (vset$G), with missing annotations median-imputed against reference_medians (STAAR does its own LD handling and collapsing).

  6. If return_evidence = TRUE, a per-region evidence packet.

B-source contract. Exactly one of b_func, b_model must be non-NULL (mirrors prepare_glow_input). Supplying both or neither is a caller error and throws.

Status semantics. The caller reads $status rather than string-matching a message:

"ok"

GLOW produced a result row ($result non-NULL). STAAR, if requested, either ran (p-values in $staar) or failed for a non-skip reason ($staar all-NA, message in $message); either way GLOW succeeded.

"skip_empty"

extract_variant_set or prepare_glow_input returned NULL (no qualifying variants). $result is NULL.

"staar_skip_single"

GLOW produced a row but STAAR could not run (fewer than 2 rare variants — STAAR's design-intended exclusion). $result is the GLOW row; $staar is all-NA.

"error"

An unexpected error in the GLOW path. $result is NULL and $message holds the error message.

References

Zhang, H., Liu, M., Landers, J. E., and Wu, Z. Integrated Weighted Association Test with Application to Genetic Association Studies. Annals of Applied Statistics (in revision).

Li, X., Li, Z., Zhou, H., et al. (2020). Dynamic incorporation of multiple in silico functional annotations empowers rare variant association analysis of large whole-genome sequencing studies at scale. Nature Genetics, 52, 969-983. doi:10.1038/s41588-020-0676-4

Li, Z., Li, X., Zhou, H., et al. (2022). A framework for detecting noncoding rare-variant associations of large-scale whole-genome sequencing studies. Nature Methods, 19, 1599-1611. doi:10.1038/s41592-022-01640-x

See also

extract_variant_set, prepare_glow_input, compute_score_stats, glow_test, define_regions_window

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
library(SeqArray)
gds <- seqOpen("chr22_essentialdb.gds")
on.exit(seqClose(gds))

region <- list(chr = "22", start = 16570000L, end = 16670000L,
               label = "chr22:16570000-16670000")
spec <- variant_filter(rare_maf_cutoff = 0.5, variant_type = "SNV")
pi   <- load_PI_models("path/to/piModels/")
feats <- c("cadd_phred", "linsight", "fathmm_xf")
meds <- compute_annotation_medians(gds, feats, spec,
                                   sample_id = null_model$sample_id)

res <- glow_region_test(
  gds, region, spec, null_model,
  pi_models = pi, pi_features = feats, reference_medians = meds,
  b_func = function(maf) sqrt(-0.14307 * log(maf * (1 - maf)) - 0.19522),
  ld_threshold = 0.95, mac_threshold = 11L)
res$status
res$result
} # }

Contents

Developed by Hong Zhang, Ming Liu, Zheyang Wu.
